chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Cr. Misc. Application No.708 of 2025 Present: Mr. Justice Muhammad Iqbal Kalhoro Mr. Justice Syed Fiaz ul Hassan Shah 1.For order on office objection 2.For hg of case Applicant:- Ali Akhtar through Mr. Aamir Zaheer Mirza, Advocate. Respondent:- The State through Mr. Habib Ahmed, Special Prosecutor ANF. Date of hearing:- 23.02.2026 =============== MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO J: This application for restoration of vehicle to possession of applicant has been opposed by learned Special Prosecutor ANF on the ground that applicant is not the registered owner and has relied upon PLD 2020 SC 299. 2. Learned counsel for applicant confronted with this scenario does not press this application for the time being and submits that either he would file application on behalf of original owner, who is otherwise present or get the registration of vehicle mutated in favour of the applicant and file the application. The Cr. Misc. Application is accordingly disposed of in above terms. JUDGE JUDGE HANIF
